race.comment: AUZSTAR (9) is racing well in northern NSW and deserves his chance at the provincials. Made late inroads to be beaten a length last start in a BM82 over 1400m at Tamworth. Veteran who draws a lovely gate and is well in after the 3kg claim. COMMANDING ARTIST (5) has been freshened up since finishing third over 1850m here a month ago. Placed at two of three runs over this distance so while fresh he is a genuine hope with the help of a favourable draw. STEALTHFIRE (8) comes here third-up after a couple of satisfactory efforts to launch this prep. Lightly raced three-year-old who has improvement to come at this stage of the campaign. ELEVEN X (3) made his Australian debut in the Listed South Pacific recently and was found wanting. Gets a tongue tie today and faces a far easier assignment. Watch for sharp improvement. Last start Hawkesbury maiden winner LONTRICE (4) has only raced three times and has great scope for further progress.
